entry.title: [MR] U.S OUT OF OIL, YEMENI HOUTHIS CLOSE BAB EL MANDAB, GROUND INVASION? w/ BRANDON WEICHERT
entry.summary:
Brandon Weichert talks about the Iran War.
Brandon J. Weichert is a senior national security editor at The National Interest. Recently, Weichert became the host of The National Security Hour on America Outloud News and iHeartRadi

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: Major Explosions in CENTRAL IRAN Right Now & U.S Out of Missiles w/ Col Karen Kwiatkowski
entry.summary:
LT Col Karen Kwiatkowski talks about how the U.S is running out of missiles.
LT Colonel Karen Kwiatkowski is an American activist and commentator. She is a retired U.S. Air Force Lieutenant Colonel whose assignments included duties as a Pentagon desk officer and a variety of roles for the National Security Agency

entry.title: [MR] TRUMP WANTS IRAN TO PAY AND WILL EXPAND ATTACKS ON IRAN w/ HARLEY SCHLANGER
entry.summary:
Harley Schlanger speaks about the Iran War.
Harley Schlanger been an associate and spoke person of Lyndon LaRouche since1972. He is also a journalist with the Executive Intelligence Review Magazine and a board member of the Schiller Institute.

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: YEMENI ANSARALLAH CLOSE THE BAB AL MANDAB, U.S NUCLEAR STRIKES ESCALATION w/ PEPE ESCOBAR
entry.summary:
Pepe Escobar breaks down how the Yemeni Ansarallah has closed the Bab Al Mandab
Pepe Escobar is a Brazilian journalist. His works have appeared in publications such as Asia Times, Mondialisation.ca, CounterPunch, Al-Jazeera, Press TV, Russia Today, Sputnik, Strategic Culture Foundation and Guancha.
#iran #politics #news #trending #abbasaraghchi #ghalibaf #china #israel #pakistan #asimmunir #blackmail #trump #hegseth #rubio #jdvance #radcliffe #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #gulfstates #uae #saudiarabia #qatar #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #usbases #imrankhan #imrankhanpti #shehbazsharif

entry.title: [MR] U.S TO EXPAND THE WAR, ISRAEL TO JOIN THE IRAN WAR, GROUND INVASION COMING? w/ CIA Larry Johnson
entry.summary:
Larry Johnson speaks about the Iran War.
Johnson worked at the CIA for four years as an analyst, then moved to the United States State Department's Office of Counterterrorism.
#larryjohnson #iran #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #oman #usbases #uae #saudiarabia #qatar

entry.title: [MR] U.S PATRIOT MISSILES DO NOT WORK, IRAN CAN EASILY HIT ISRAEL & U.S BASES w/ PROF. TED POSTOL
entry.summary:
Professor Theodore A. Postol talks about the Iran War.
Theodore A. Postol is a professor emeritus of Science, Technology, and International Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. Prior to his work at MIT, he worked at Argonne National Laboratory, the Pentagon, and Stanford University.
#iran #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #oman #usbases #uae #saudiarabia #qatar
entry.content:
Professor Theodore A. Postol talks about the Iran War.

Theodore A. Postol is a professor emeritus of Science, Technology, and International Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. Prior to his work at MIT, he worked at Argonne National Laboratory, the Pentagon, and Stanford University.

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: 4 U.S SOLDIERS DEAD IN 48 HOURS, IRAN READY FOR GROUND INVASION
entry.summary:
Chris Martenson talks about the the U.S is out of oil.
Chris Martenson on his YouTube channel provides Information, commentary, analysis, and an online community for discussing the convergence of global issues facing the economy, environment, and energy needs.

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: ANOTHER U.S SOLDIER DIES IN IRAQ, ISRAEL TO ENTER THE WAR w/ ECONOMIST PAUL CRAIG ROBERTS
entry.summary:
Paul Craig Roberts talks about the Iran War.
Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.
#iran #politics #news #trending #israel #abbasaraghchi #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #usbases #irandeal
entry.content:
Paul Craig Roberts talks about the Iran War.

Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.

entry.summary:
KJ Noh speaks about the Iran War.
KJ Noh is a journalist, political analyst, writer, and educator specializing in the geopolitics and political economy of the Asia-Pacific region.

entry.title: [MR] PROFESSOR MARANDI: GROUND INVASION COMING, 16 U.S SOLDIERS DEAD, F-15 FIGHTER JETS DESTROYED
entry.summary:
Professor Marandi speaks about the Iran War.
Professor Mohammad Marandi is one of the most prominent voices on the Iran conflict, regularly appearing on BBC, Al Jazeera, CNN, and Sky News. He is a professor of English Literature and Orientalism at the University of Tehran and a former adviser to Iran's nuclear negotiation team.
#marandi #iran #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #araghchi #ghalibaf #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #pakistan #switzerland #china #asimmunir #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #oman #usbases #uae #saudiarabia
entry.content:
Professor Marandi speaks about the Iran War.

Professor Mohammad Marandi is one of the most prominent voices on the Iran conflict, regularly appearing on BBC, Al Jazeera, CNN, and Sky News. He is a professor of English Literature and Orientalism at the University of Tehran and a former adviser to Iran's nuclear negotiation team.

entry.summary:

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: U.S IS STRIKING IRAN RIGHT NOW, U.S START NAVAL BLOCKADE w/ LT Col Karen Kwiatkowski
entry.summary:
LT Col Karen Kwiatkowski talks about how the U.S start a Naval Blockade.
LT Colonel Karen Kwiatkowski is an American activist and commentator. She is a retired U.S. Air Force Lieutenant Colonel whose assignments included duties as a Pentagon desk officer and a variety of roles for the National Security Agency

entry.title: [MR] BREAKING: HUGE NUMBER OF FIGHTER JETS TO IRAN, LINDSAY GRAHAM DEAD w/ ECONOMIST PAUL CRAIG ROBERTS
entry.summary:
Paul Craig Roberts talks about how Lindsay Graham is dead.
Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.
#iran #politics #news #trending #israel #abbasaraghchi #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #usbases #irandeal
entry.content:
Paul Craig Roberts talks about how Lindsay Graham is dead.

Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.
